summary: Channels/sources sub-model: lists monitored sources, handles delete-with-confirm, and runs a 3-step add-source wizard
state: channelsModel value type; holds channels list, cursor, confirmDelete flag, addMode flag, wizard step (addStep), addCursor, addSourceType, addNameInput, addURLInput

observations.text: The add-source wizard is entirely self-contained within channelsModel — it manages 3-step state (type selection, name input, URL input) and only emits addSourceMsg to App when the final step (URL) is confirmed with a non-empty value.
channelDeletedMsg is handled in channelsModel.Update to splice out the deleted item from the local slice — this is optimistic local removal before the App reloads channels from storage.

Input handling in addStepName and addStepURL is manual (switch on msg.Type for KeyBackspace/KeyEnter/KeyRunes) rather than using a bubbles/textinput component — trades simplicity for lack of cursor positioning in the text field.
addURLInput is required non-empty to advance (line 159), but addNameInput trimming is done via != empty without trimming — whitespace-only names are accepted as valid.
sourceTypeOptions slice defines the canonical ordering of source types for the add wizard. It is separate from filterTypeCycle in dashboard.go — both must be kept in sync if source types are added.
